entry.title: Real-Time Liveness Detection Solutions for Deepfake Fraud
entry.summary: Face liveness won't stop a cloned voice from bypassing your IVR. See how real-time liveness detection solutions address deepfake fraud across both channels.

entry.title: The Deepfake Detection Guide (Deepfake 101): Threat Vectors and Four Defense Layers
entry.summary: Deepfakes now cost businesses millions. Learn what they are, where they strike, why your stack misses them, and the four layers of defense every company needs. This practical guide to deepfakes for security and fraud teams breaks down core concepts, how AI deepfakes are built and how to detect deepfakes with and without automation.

entry.title: Chatterbox Nano and Flash: Speed at the edge, throughput at scale
entry.summary: Meet the fraternal twins of TTS. Chatterbox Nano is 110M parameters built for the edge. Chatterbox Flash is diffusion-LLM architecture built for scale. Both open source, both watermarked by default from Resemble AI.

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of June 26 – July 2, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: Deepfake fraud at work: video call scams, face swaps, and vishing
entry.summary: ‍A recording of the Resemble AI webinar on how synthetic media is being used to defraud finance and hiring teams, and the controls that hold up in the real world.Deepfake fraud has moved out of the research lab and into ordinary business workflows. The tools that clone a voice from a few seconds of audio or swap a face onto a live webcam feed are now cheap, fast, and good enough to pass a routine Zoom or Teams call. In this session, Zohaib Ahmed and Will Krispin walk through where this shows up most at work, the meeting, the phone call, the receipt or document, and the hiring pipeline, and what teams can actually do about it.

entry.title: Complete Guide to EU AI Act Watermarking Requirements for Generative AI
entry.summary: Prepare for EU AI Act Watermarking Requirements for Generative AI with Article 50 checks for marking, disclosure, and 2026 readiness.

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of June 19-25, 2026
entry.summary: ‍The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: How Deepfake Detection in Forensics Strengthens Case Review
entry.summary: Explore how deepfake detection in forensics supports evidence review, case context, documentation, and risk-based decisions in 2026.

entry.title: PerTh Multimodal: Enterprise Multimodal Watermarking for Audio, Video, Image, and Text
entry.summary: PerTh Multimodal extends Resemble Watermarker from audio-only to audio, video, image, and text — an imperceptible mark, compliance-oriented for EU AI Act Article 50.

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of June 5–11, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: Chatterbox Multilingual v3: TTS with embedded watermarking for 25 languages
entry.summary: Chatterbox Multilingual v3 open source ships with PerTh watermarking embedded by default on every self-hosted audio output, across every supported language. Provenance and the ability to automatically watermark outputs is a major component of this release as regulation like the EU AI Act Article 50 loom, and as voice AI and text-to-speech models strive to be more trustworthy and verifiable at generation time.

entry.title: Detect Candidate Fraud In Remote Hiring: Red Flags, Funnel Checks, And Access Risk
entry.summary: Learn best practices for detecting candidate fraud in remote hiring with funnel checks, interview red flags, identity review, and live deepfake detection.
